title: Logo direction
lead: Two decisions: overall direction, then extras.

contexts.summary: Wordmark vs monogram for a brand nobody recognizes yet.
contexts.recommendation: Wordmark — legibility now beats compactness we don't need yet.

contexts.summary: Both extras are cheap once the mark exists.
contexts.body: Legacy v0.8.0 field — tolerated as an ignored extra, never validated.
contexts.recommendation: Take both — each is under an hour of derivation work.
